PLAINTIFF STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM ORDER TO PAY SANCTIONS ISSUED ON 1/26/2008 TO DAVID J. COOK, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: DENISE DOUCETTE CSR# 5963. (212)
